title: MagicBricks is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: MagicBricks is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? MagicBricks in Raipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About MagicBricks:
MagicBricks is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MagicBricks!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
